name: nemo-relay-codex-observability
description: Codex hooks that forward canonical lifecycle payloads to nemo-relay-sidecar.

interface.shortDescription: Forward Codex lifecycle hooks to a local NeMo Relay sidecar.
interface.longDescription: Installs command hooks that preserve Codex hook payloads and forward them to nemo-relay-sidecar for agent, subagent, tool, and lifecycle observability. Full LLM capture also requires sidecar provider routing.
